channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta's 3,600 Layoffs: Employees Fight Back Against "Low Performer" Label
item.description: Meta's CEO Mark Zuckerberg has announced a new round of layoffs, affecting 3,600 employees or roughly 5% of the company's total workforce. Some affected workers are pushing back against being labeled as 'low performers,' claiming they were previously rated as strong contributors.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
